blended.narrative: Pine Knob is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 48°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
